projects.description: Full-scale online retail application, including checkout, user registry, cart systems, and payment endpoints.
The logging processor engine, AI parser endpoints, and UI dashboard backend for SafeDeploy.

modules.description: Handles Stripe checkout integrations and webhook receivers.
Controls product catalog lookup indexes and MongoDB aggregations.
Ingests server stdout logs and tags tracebacks.

deployments.notes:
Building container...
Checking dependencies...
Migrating database...
Deployment completed successfully.

deployments.issueDescription: Stripe API connection timed out due to missing proxy headers in the custom firewall configuration.
deployments.rootCause: Container firewall policies blocked egress traffic on port 443 to external hosts without explicit proxy headers.
deployments.fixApplied: Added ingress proxy headers and configured the firewall to permit egress traffic on port 443 to *.stripe.com. Added strict timeout settings of 5000ms.
deployments.notes:
Building container...
Loading environment variables...
FATAL ERROR: process out of memory / Stripe connection error.
Error: connection timed out at Stripe client link (port 443).

deployments.issueDescription: Unable to resolve MongoDB Atlas hostname inside the VPC container due to DNS misconfiguration.
deployments.rootCause: VPC container Kubernetes CoreDNS lacked host file entry resolvers for Atlas public cluster shards.
deployments.fixApplied: Configured custom DNS resolvers in Kubernetes pod configuration (coredns overrides) and whitelisted VPC CIDR block inside MongoDB Atlas Security Settings.
deployments.notes:
Initializing mongo connect...
MongooseServerSelectionError: connection timed out after 30000ms.
Database connection failed. Exiting process.
